Bind Armament.name: 绑定武装 Bind Armament
Bind Armament.description:
你将当前主手已装备的武器绑定为你的束缚武装。

在绑定期间，你可以不消耗任何资源，将该武器召唤到一只空闲的手中。无论距离多远，你都可以召唤这把武器，即使它已被缴械。

You bind the weapon currently equipped in your main-hand as your Bound Armament.

While bound, you may conjure the weapon into a free hand without any resource cost. You can conjure the weapon across any distance including if it has been Disarmed.

bindArmament.name: 绑定武装 Bind Armament
bindArmament.description:
你将当前主手已装备的武器绑定为你的束缚武装。

You bind the weapon currently equipped in your main-hand as your Bound Armament.

conjureArmament.name: 召唤武装 Conjure Armament
conjureArmament.description:
你将自己的束缚武装召回手中。只要你有足够的空闲手来持握它，这把武器就会瞬间回到你手中，并且不再处于缴械状态。

You call your bound armament back into your grasp. As long as you have sufficient free hands to hold it, the weapon returns instantaneously to you and is no longer Disarmed.

Curse of Atrophy.name: 萎缩诅咒 Curse of Atrophy
Curse of Atrophy.description:
你削弱目标的体力，使其肌肉萎缩并虚弱下来，而且这种衰弱无法通过普通的休息或恢复来消除。

You sap the physical strength of your target, causing their muscles to wither and weaken in a way that cannot be undone by ordinary rest or recovery.

curseAtrophy.name: 萎缩诅咒 Curse of Atrophy
curseAtrophy.description:
触碰目标，使其受到一种衰败诅咒，令其力量永久降低 2 点。

Touch the target to afflict them with a wasting curse that permanently reduces their Strength by 2.

effects.name: 萎缩诅咒 Curse of Atrophy

Curse of Delusion.name: 妄想诅咒 Curse of Delusion
Curse of Delusion.description:
你使目标的头脑变得混沌，永久损害其察觉与判断力，而且这种损害无法通过普通治疗恢复。

You cloud the clarity of your target's mind, permanently impairing their perception and sound judgment in ways that resist ordinary healing.

curseDelusion.name: 妄想诅咒 Curse of Delusion
curseDelusion.description:
触碰目标，用诅咒蒙蔽其感知，使其感知永久降低 2 点。

Touch the target to becloud their perceptions with a curse that permanently reduces their Wisdom by 2.

effects.name: 妄想诅咒 Curse of Delusion

Curse of Dullness.name: 迟钝诅咒 Curse of Dullness
Curse of Dullness.description:
你令目标体内的智慧火花黯淡下来，永久损害其迅速思考与推理的能力，而这种损伤并非仅靠休息就能修复。

You dim the spark of intellect within your target, permanently impairing their capacity for swift thought and reasoning in ways that cannot be mended by rest alone.

curseDullness.name: 迟钝诅咒 Curse of Dullness
curseDullness.description:
触碰目标，以一道诅咒钝化其心智，使其智力永久降低 2 点。

Touch the target to dull their mind with a curse that permanently reduces their Intellect by 2.

effects.name: 迟钝诅咒 Curse of Dullness

Curse of Exhaustion.name: 疲惫诅咒 Curse of Exhaustion
Curse of Exhaustion.description:
你汲取目标的生命韧性，使其在体质上变得虚弱，而且这种状态会持续，无法通过任何普通的恢复手段消除。

You drain the vital resilience of your target, leaving them constitutionally weakened in a way that persists beyond any ordinary recovery.

curseExhaustion.name: 疲惫诅咒 Curse of Exhaustion
curseExhaustion.description:
触碰目标，以一道诅咒汲取其生命力，使其坚韧永久降低 2 点。

Touch the target to drain their vitality with a curse that permanently reduces their Toughness by 2.

effects.name: 疲惫诅咒 Curse of Exhaustion

Curse of Lethargy.name: 倦怠诅咒 Curse of Lethargy
Curse of Lethargy.description:
你扼灭了目标体内迅捷的火花，使其反应变得迟钝，并让其身体的应对速度减缓，而且这种影响会永久持续。

You smother the spark of quickness within your target, dulling their reflexes and slowing their body's response in a way that endures permanently.

curseLethargy.name: 倦怠诅咒 Curse of Lethargy
curseLethargy.description:
触碰目标，使其陷入迟缓状态，并使其敏捷永久降低 2 点。

Touch the target to afflict them with sluggishness, permanently reducing their Dexterity by 2.

effects.name: 倦怠诅咒 Curse of Lethargy

Curse of Scorn.name: 轻蔑诅咒 Curse of Scorn
Curse of Scorn.description:
你削弱目标人格的力量，使其不再那么有感染力，也更难让他人听从，而且这种影响被证明是永久性的。

You diminish the force of your target's personality, making them less compelling and harder for others to heed in a way that proves permanent.

curseScorn.name: 轻蔑诅咒 Curse of Scorn
curseScorn.description:
触碰目标，以一道诅咒枯萎其意志之力，使其风采永久降低 2 点。

Touch the target to wither their force of will with a curse that permanently reduces their Presence by 2.

effects.name: 轻蔑诅咒 Curse of Scorn

Dawn Beacon.name: 曙光信标 Dawn Beacon
Dawn Beacon.description:
你唤出黎明的刺目光芒，穿透你周围的黑暗，照亮该区域，并驱散魔法黑暗的源头。

You call forth the piercing light of dawn that penetrates the darkness around you, revealing the area and dispelling sources of magical darkness.

dawnBeacon.name: 曙光信标 Dawn Beacon
dawnBeacon.description:
你以当前位置为中心创造一根魔法光柱，形成一个光照圆柱，提供30英尺的明亮光照，以及额外30英尺的微光。该光柱会在原地持续6轮，直到被驱散为止。

这道魔法光照会对抗魔法黑暗，并摧毁任何起源位于其区域内的魔法黑暗源头。

光照首次生成时，区域内的敌人必须抵抗一次针对其坚韧的攻击，否则会陷入@Condition[blinded]状态，持续一轮。

WIP：该法术目前尚不会自动创建光源，暂时必须手动完成。最终这将通过 Foundry VTT 第14版中用于模板放置的新框架实现自动化。

You create a pillar of magical light centered upon your current position which creates a cylinder of light creating 30 feet of bright light and an additional 30 feet of dim light. The pillar remains in place for 6 rounds or until dispelled.

This magical light counteracts magical darkness and destroys any source of magical darkness whose origin is contained within its area.

Enemies within the area when the light is first created must resist an attack against their Fortitude or be @Condition[blinded] for one round.

WIP: This spell does not yet automatically create a light source, which must be done manually for now. Eventually this will be automated using a new Foundry VTT version 14 framework for template placement.

Engulfing Darkness.name: 吞噬黑暗 Engulfing Darkness
Engulfing Darkness.description:
你召唤出一个充满压迫感的魔法黑暗球体，笼罩视野，并在其区域内扼杀光亮。

You conjure an oppressive sphere of magical darkness that shrouds vision and suffocates light within its area.

engulfingDarkness.name: 吞噬黑暗 Engulfing Darkness
engulfingDarkness.description:
你在当前位置周围创造一个半径20英尺的魔法黑暗球体，它会保持在原地持续6轮，直到被驱散为止。

在这片黑暗区域内，所有非魔法光源都会熄灭，且生物视为处于@Condition[blinded]状态。

该球体的区域会受到实体墙壁的限制。该区域外的生物无法看入其中，而该区域外的光源其有效照明范围会止于其边界。

WIP：此法术目前尚不会自动创建一个黑暗源，暂时必须手动完成。未来将使用 Foundry VTT 第14版中用于模板放置的新框架实现自动化。

You create a sphere of magical darkness around your current position with 20 foot radius which remains in place for 6 rounds or until dispelled.

Within the area of this darkness all non-magical light sources are quenched and creatures are treated as @Condition[blinded].

The area of this sphere is constrained by solid walls. Creatures outside this area cannot see into it and the effective area of light sources outside this area ends at its perimeter.

WIP: This spell does not yet automatically create a darkness source, which must be done manually for now. Eventually this will be automated using a new Foundry VTT version 14 framework for template placement.

Invisibility.name: 隐形 Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
隐形法术是幻术魔法的一种精妙运用，它让施法者能够像披上斗篷一样将光与影裹在自己周围，反射其周遭的世界，仿佛他们根本不在那里。既然连自己的眼睛都告诉人们那里什么也没有，又有谁会不相信呢？

A sophisticated use of Illusory magic, the Invisibility spell allows the caster to wrap light and shadow around themselves like donning a cloak, reflecting the world about them as if they were not standing there. What person wouldn't believe it when their own eyes tell them that there is nothing to see?

invisibility.name: 隐形 Invisibility
invisibility.description:
你获得@Condition[invisible]，且无法通过基于视觉的察觉被发现。你不能成为任何动作的直接目标。此法术必须被维持才能持续生效。

You become @Condition[invisible] and cannot be detected using sight-based perception. You cannot be directly targeted by any action. This spell must be Maintained in order to remain in effect.

Lifebloom.name: 生命绽放 Lifebloom
Lifebloom.description:
能够在物质世界中充当导体、让生命与灵魂的原初力量交融，并使天平向自己倾斜者，寥寥无几。这个法术使施法者成为丰沛力量的泉源，而正是这些力量将一切拥有灵魂的生命带入存在。伴随着一阵轻柔的气流低语，施法者周身环绕着生命与灵魂纯粹能量所化的跃动微光，宛如数十只萤火虫或火中迸出的火星；而范围内的人都会被一种平静的感受充盈，仿佛浸没在令人舒适的温水之中。周围所有植物生命都会立刻跨越数个生长阶段而绽放，空气中也随即弥漫起花粉与繁茂草木的气息。

Few are those that can serve as a conduit within the physical world and allow the raw powers of Life and Soul to comingle, tipping the balance in their favour. This spell allows the caster to serve as a wellspring for the abundant forces that bring all soulful life into being. With a susurration of air the caster is surrounded with dancing motes of the pure energies of life and soul, like dozens of fireflies or the sparks from a fire, and a those within the radius are filled with a calming sensation as if they were immersed in pleasantly warm water. All plant life in the vicinity immediately surges through stages of growth to bloom, and the scent of pollen and lush greenery fills the air.

lifebloom.name: 生命绽放 Lifebloom
lifebloom.description:
你将生命魔法注入一个灵气之中，恢复你周围30英尺内所有盟友的生命值和士气。每一轮，回合开始时位于此灵气内的盟友都会恢复等同于你的感知的生命值和士气。该法术必须维持。

开发中：该法术目前被视为一个范围效果，会对初始范围内的目标赋予持续治疗效果。若该法术不再被维持，则这些效果目前需要手动移除。等到 Foundry VTT 第14版中的灵气实现系统自动化后，该法术的机制实现将与描述一致。

You channel vital magic into an aura that restores the Health and Morale of all allies within 30 feet of you. Each round, allies who start their turn within this aura recover your Wisdom in both Health and Morale. The spell must be maintained.

WIP: This spell is currently treated as an Area of Effect, granting healing-over-time effects to those within initial range. Removal of these effects if the spell ceases being maintained must be done manually for now. When auras are automated by the system in Foundry VTT version 14, the mechanical implementation of this spell will match the description.

Protective Mirage.name: 护佑幻影 Protective Mirage
Protective Mirage.description:
你让自身显现于由不断变幻的照明与阴影构成的海市蜃楼中，借此掩盖你当前的位置，并使你能够闪避来袭的攻击。

You Aspect yourself in a mirage of shifting Illumination and Shadow which mask your current position and allow you to Elude incoming blows.

protectiveMirage.name: 护佑幻影 Protective Mirage
protectiveMirage.description:
你会被三个幻象分身环绕，最多持续 10 轮。任何针对你的传入打击，都要承受数量等于你剩余分身数量两倍的祸骰。每当一次打击未命中你时，你的一个分身就会消失。

You become surrounded by three illusory duplicates which last up to 10 Rounds. Any incoming Strike against you is made with a number of Banes equal to two times your number of duplicates remaining. Each time a Strike misses you, one of your duplicates disappears.

Revive.name: 救醒 Revive
Revive.description:
作为生命与控制魔法的强力体现，救醒使施法者能够通过将一股生命精华的激涌注入新近死者的身体，介入死亡的自然过程。经历过救醒的人往往不愿谈论此事，但他们形容那感觉令人不快地让人联想到：从沉沉酣睡中被突然唤醒，却发现自己一直冷得发僵——肌肤刺痛酸楚，神智眩乱，而灵魂则因离去被中断的记忆而隐隐作痛。

A potent expression of Life and Control magics, Revive allows the caster to intervene in the natural process of death by driving a surge of the essence of life into the body of the recently deceased. Those who have experienced Revival are often reluctant to discuss it, but describe it as a sensation that is unpleasantly reminiscent of being woken suddenly from a deep slumber to find they have been freezing— the flesh prickles and aches, the mind reels, and the soul aches with the memory of its interrupted departure.

revive.name: 救醒 Revive
revive.description:
你使一个最近刚刚 @Condition[dead] 的生物恢复生命，并将其创伤减少你的感知值。若成功，复活的生物将陷入 @Condition[disoriented] 和 @Condition[staggered] 状态，持续10分钟。

You restore a creature which has recently become @Condition[dead] back to life, reducing its Wounds by your Wisdom score. If successful, the revived creature is @Condition[disoriented] and @Condition[staggered] for 10 minutes.

Telecognition.name: 遥感认知 Telecognition
Telecognition.description:
这是渗透他人心智这一复杂技艺的一个粗浅示例，遥感认知会像从池塘地表撇去树叶一样，从目标心智的表层掠取思绪。虽然它未必会造成扰乱，但却并不隐蔽——正如触碰池塘地表时会泛起涟漪，心智也同样如此。

A rudimentary example of the complex art of penetrating the minds of others, Telecognition skims thoughts from the surface of a subject's mind like leaves from the surface of a pond. Though it may not be disruptive, it is unsubtle— just as the pond ripples when its surface is touched, so too does the mind.

telecognition.name: 遥感认知 Telecognition
telecognition.description:
你将意识探入一个人型生物或巨人生物的心智，试图突破其意志防御，以理解他们的想法与动机。该法术的目标会察觉到这种入侵，即使他们无法感知到你。

若成功，游戏主持人（当目标为对手时）或玩家（当目标为英雄时）必须用不超过3个词向你描述此刻其思绪最前端的想法或情绪。

在大成功时，该描述最多可使用10个词，以传达更深层的理解。

You reach into the mind of a Humanoid or Giant creature, attempting to penetrate their Willpower defense to understand their thoughts and motives. The target of this spell is aware of the intrusion, even if they cannot perceive you.

If successful, the Gamemaster (in the case of an Adversary target) or Player (in the case of a Hero target) must describe to you in 3 words or less what idea or sentiment is at the forefront of their thoughts in the current moment.

Upon a Critical Success, this description may use up to 10 words to convey deeper understanding.
